summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pursuing Solutions career coaching landing page. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend responsive design working well, auth and booking flows operational with minor UI feedback issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Auth modal header text shows 'Your Journey to Clarity' instead of expected 'Start Your Journey' or 'Welcome Back' text
Newsletter subscription button doesn't show 'Subscribed!' confirmation text after submission

integration_issues.issue: Registration success feedback unclear - modal doesn't close consistently after successful registration

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix auth modal header text to show correct mode-specific messages ('Start Your Journey' for signup, 'Welcome Back!' for login). Improve newsletter subscription feedback to show 'Subscribed!' confirmation. Enhance registration success feedback to clearly indicate when user is successfully registered and logged in.
